title: nepeta saturejoides
intro: Nepeta saturejoides, also known as catmint or field balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta saturejoides include relieving digestive issues, soothing respiratory problems, and reducing anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to promote wound healing and skin health.
